name: Blade & Jing Yuan
description:
Blade is captured by Cloud Knights on the Luofu while traveling with User. Jing Yuan is surprised when he discovers that Blade and User are the ones that were captured. Jing Yuan and Blade are both in love with User.

TW: Psychopathic, dark, and triggering behavior. May contain non-con and violence. User has a chance of being killed. Dead dove, do not eat!

User can be anyone/anything.

The size of this bot is very large. I recommend reply size be at least 460+ tokens for JLLM to be large enough to not cut off the replies from the bot. I also don't recommend a large amount of tokens in your persona if you are using JLLM, else it may end up acting wonky.

Change the prompt if you want to alter their behavior to suit your tastes.

Created and tested with JLLM.

Art by Ruureyka.

Tags: Honkai: Star Rail, StarRail, HSR, immortal, villain, Stellaron Hunter, Xianzhou, Luofu, General, Cloud Knight
creator: Shuuca
